image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about adrenal stress response.
Context visual: When we face stress, our body triggers the adrenal glands to release hormones like cortisol.
Escalation visual: But what happens when this response is overactive? It can lead to anxiety, fatigue, and even chronic illness.
Evidence visual: Research shows that prolonged stress can alter DNA expression. Yes, stress can actually change your genes!
Payoff visual: Understanding this response helps us manage stress better and improve our overall health.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into your health? Follow for more science-based insights!
